subpoints: When the persistent notification is enabled in General Settings, it has two new action buttons that allow you to pause SpeakThat or its rules temporarily!

text: Advanced Voice Options section has been improved and consolidated.
subpoints: Now allows selection of specific voices and engines rather than it all being split up. Language Preset still works the same.

text: Skip Repeated Prefix no longer applies to Private Mode.
subpoints: Previously, if two consecutive private notifications were read, but one had a different app, only the app name would be read. This has been fixed now.

text: Accessibility Service has been removed from the Play Store edition.
subpoints: Google has been throwing a hissy fit over this lately and they want me to clutter the home screen of the app with a legal disclosure. Sod that.
If any of the accessibility features were important to you, you just need to export your settings and re-download the app from outside the Play Store. See the website for details!

text: Filter Empty Text is now part of the Remove Emojis tool.
subpoints: Ultimately this feature exists to ensure that notifications that would just announce an emoji will not be read when emoji removal is enabled.

text: Priority Apps now appear as an App List under Notification Behaviour.
subpoints: You previously needed to press the Manage Apps button to view the currently selected Priority Apps. Not any more!.
Filter settings spacing has been more clearly defined as it was inconsistent with the rest of the app.
